extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed by and against each entity: I counted only the “Against our Company” row, which has 0 criminal, 9 tax and 0 statutory/regulatory proceedings; the “By our Company” row has 2 criminal matters and was excluded, as were promoter matters and all other “By” rows. The quantified aggregate amount against the company is ₹33.10 million; the promoter amount of ₹0.15 million is excluded because the aggregate amount field covers the company and subsidiaries only, giving ₹3.31 crore after conversion from million (₹33.10 million ÷ 10). The contingent-liabilities table is as at June 30, 2024 and lists ₹3.00 million and ₹16.67 million, but has no stated Total row, so the required total is not disclosed rather than re-summed. Company-wide top-customer concentration for the full Fiscal 2024 is based on revenue from operations: top five customers were 21.39% and top ten customers were 31.69%; these are not segment-only figures. Monetary tables use ₹ million, converted to crore at 10 million = 1 crore.
